visual_description: In a dimly lit room, two men in white shirts sit at a desk, wearing large headphones and speaking into microphones. The man on the right adjusts his headphones and looks up with a focused expression. A third person in a dark suit is partially visible in the foreground, also wearing a headset.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, clear tone, giving a command or alert. The audio is clean and intelligible, suggesting a controlled communication environment.
